major_mechanics.name: Death Bloom
major_mechanics.when: Occurs at regular intervals throughout the fight.
major_mechanics.watch_for: A large expanding red AoE around the boss with a pulsing animation.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Move out of the expanding circle immediately while maintaining awareness of scythe patterns.
major_mechanics.failure: Standing in the AoE deals heavy ticking damage and can quickly down players.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players dodging into scythes; reacting too slowly; stacking too close to the boss.

major_mechanics.name: Spinning Scythes
major_mechanics.when: Active throughout the fight, with new scythes spawning in patterns as the fight progresses.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Scythes materializing on the ground and rotating in predictable paths.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Learn the scythe patterns and position safely between them while maintaining DPS.
major_mechanics.failure: Being hit by a scythe deals massive damage and often results in instant death.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players standing in scythe spawn points; panicking during movement-heavy moments.

major_mechanics.name: Tormented Dead
major_mechanics.when: Spawn periodically and fixate on random players.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Large undead adds glowing with red energy running toward their fixated target.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Kite the Tormented Dead away from the group until they explode safely.
major_mechanics.failure: Explosions inside the group cause lethal damage and can wipe the raid.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Fixated players running through the stack; killing the add too close to the group.

minor_mechanics.name: Flesh Wurms
minor_mechanics.summary: Wurms spawn and must be killed to reduce arena pressure.

major_mechanics.name: Orb Carriers
major_mechanics.when: Occurs repeatedly as players progress along the river path.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Orbs floating above platforms and glowing indicators showing where they must be delivered.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Pick up orbs and carry them to the correct platforms to stabilize the path forward.
major_mechanics.failure: Missing orb deliveries causes platforms to collapse or prevents progression.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Dropping orbs accidentally; not coordinating who carries which orb; running ahead without stabilizing platforms.

major_mechanics.name: Soul Walls
major_mechanics.when: Appear at fixed intervals along the path.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Large walls of ghostly faces sweeping horizontally across the arena.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Time your movement to pass through gaps or wait for the wall to pass.
major_mechanics.failure: Being hit by a soul wall deals heavy damage and can knock players off platforms.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players rushing ahead; misjudging wall timing; jumping into walls while gliding.

minor_mechanics.name: Platform Breaks
minor_mechanics.summary: Platforms collapse behind the group, forcing constant movement.

major_mechanics.name: Orb Passing
major_mechanics.when: Occurs during each statue lane as players progress toward the final platform.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Orbs spawning at the start of each lane and glowing indicators showing where they must be delivered.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Pass orbs between players to reach the end of the lane while handling enemies.
major_mechanics.failure: Dropping or losing orbs resets lane progress.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players running ahead without passing; dropping orbs in unsafe areas; poor coordination.

major_mechanics.name: Split Lanes
major_mechanics.when: Active throughout the encounter as players divide into three lanes.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Three distinct paths with unique enemies and mechanics.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Assign balanced groups to each lane and complete lane-specific objectives simultaneously.
major_mechanics.failure: If one lane fails, the entire encounter resets.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Unbalanced lane assignments; ignoring lane mechanics; lack of communication.

minor_mechanics.name: Enforcer Adds
minor_mechanics.summary: Enforcers spawn and must be killed quickly to avoid wipes.

major_mechanics.name: Reapers
major_mechanics.when: Active throughout the fight as each Reaper performs their ritual.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Reapers channeling in fixed positions around the arena.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Protect Reapers from adds and ensure they complete their ritual to progress the fight.
major_mechanics.failure: If a Reaper dies, the encounter fails.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players leaving Reapers unprotected; ignoring add spawns; poor lane assignments.

major_mechanics.name: Shackles
major_mechanics.when: Applied periodically to pairs of players starting at 60% health.
major_mechanics.watch_for: A glowing tether linking two players together.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Move apart slowly until the tether breaks without dragging through dangerous areas.
major_mechanics.failure: If players move too far too fast, they take heavy damage or die.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players sprinting apart; dragging shackles through Reapers or the group.

major_mechanics.name: Death Mark
major_mechanics.when: Occurs at regular intervals during the fight, every 30 seconds rotating between greater and lesser.
major_mechanics.watch_for: A large red AoE appears beneath a random player.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Move the AoE away from the group before it detonates.
major_mechanics.failure: Detonating Death Mark inside the group deals massive damage.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players panicking and running through the stack; dropping marks near Reapers.

major_mechanics.name: Messengers
major_mechanics.when: Spawn periodically and move toward Dhuum.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Ghostly adds floating toward the boss.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Kill Messengers before they reach Dhuum to prevent him from gaining strength.
major_mechanics.failure: If Messengers reach Dhuum, he gains stacks that increase raid damage.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players ignoring Messenger spawns; chasing them too far from the group.

minor_mechanics.name: Greater Death Mark
minor_mechanics.summary: A larger version of Death Mark that requires careful placement.
